prestazioni: Engine: 4.2L V8 (engine code BCY) with a custom billet crankshaft from Manley Performance (92.8mm stroke) and forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 compression) for 800+ HP potential on E85. Pair with a Garrett GTX5533R turbo (0.92 A/R, ball-bearing) and a custom 4.5" stainless steel downpipe from IPE Performance with a 4" titanium exhaust system by Akrapović (slip-on design, dual 100mm outlets).

Drivetrain: Reinforced 6-speed Tiptronic transmission (ZF 6HP28A) with a Peloquin LSD (40% lock) and a custom Quaife ATB differential for the rear. Upgraded driveshafts from The Driveshaft Shop (3.5" carbon fiber) and a South Bend Clutch (triple-disc, cerametallic) for the manual swap option.

Suspension & Handling: Full Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV 2-way adjustable) with custom valving for the Avantissimo’s 1,650kg weight. Front and rear sway bars from H&R (28mm front, 25mm rear) with spherical bearings. Brembo GT-R big brake kit (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with 400mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads. Custom polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (full chassis refresh) and a Whiteline rear subframe brace.
estetica: Body: Full Rocket Bunny widebody kit (Pandem Design) with custom carbon fiber fender flares (3.5" wider front, 4" wider rear) and a custom front splitter from Varis (3D-scanned for the Avantissimo’s unique nose). Rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon (integrated with the stock bumper for OEM+ fitment).

Wheels & Aero: Forged BBS LM-R wheels (9.5x20 ET30 front, 11x20 ET25 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/30/20 front, 315/25/20 rear). Custom carbon fiber hood by APR (functional dual vents for turbo cooling) and a fixed rear wing by Voltex (Type 3, 1,200mm width, 3D-printed aluminum mounts).

Interior: Full Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs, Alcantara/leather upholstery) with custom mounting brackets for the Avantissimo’s floorpan. Roll cage by Custom Cages (8-point, T45 steel, bolt-in) with integrated fire suppression system by Lifeline. Momo Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede) with a quick-release hub by NRG. Digital dash by AIM MXS Strada (12" display, CAN bus integration for the BCY engine data).
